{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004340961CC820BF36F809B31B"}"},"total":884},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7330687079980565310","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书写的很不错，很有烟火气息，而且配角也给了恰到好处的镜头，并非全文围绕主角来写，是好书。而且目前看下来全文也没有什么毒点。推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706811254,"group_id":"7313791127176350754","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4BdayAFgS8ttc1sx9m6px+Wwkqy/NnvA5aIymWgAZ5E","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b760510414674c7e90c65e146f93586b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792658&x-signature=kScoQ30z4RlcIi1jn5tx9Dts%2Fe0%3D","user_id":"2370961250200365","user_name":"飞牛公主"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2370961250200365","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742528284,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7313791127176350754","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食】【开店】【无女主】【系统】【下饭】【温馨】【日常】【每天不同菜单】【价格亲民】【群像】
楼远舟因为吃了太多料理包，结果竟然因此获得厨神美食系统！只要开店并完成各种奇奇怪怪的任务，就能获得奖励！
热气腾腾的馄饨，爽滑筋道的炸酱面，还有传说中的羊肉煲……全都是出自于楼远舟之手！
自己的餐厅营业后，更是每天都有不同的菜单，这哪个食客能顶得住啊？
“吃了楼老板的馄饨，我一天能抓八个小偷！年底的业绩稳了！”某派出所的年轻警察如是说着。
“起初我是不信有这么好吃的小店的，直到我一顿吃了两盘辣子鸡！我还给来我们公司开会的领导来了几盘！然后我升职了！”某互联网大厂员工匿名发言。
“要我说楼老板做的饭菜就很一般，你们吃不到也没什么……都去吃别家吧，楼老板这边儿让我一个人承受就够了！”吃惯了山珍海味的某大佬为了吃一口楼远舟做的菜，脸都不要了！
渐渐地，楼远舟的小店竟然成了美食风向标，更是一步一步走向世界！
在这里，不管是馋人的肠粉还是豆花，亦或是酸辣肥牛和香辣猪蹄，每一种美食里承载的，都是吃货们那热爱美食的心！
本书又名【每天新菜单？美食小店爆火全网】【美食小店爆火，治愈万千食客】【美食：我的小店，名震全球】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/289c4b1ede2198a7d3c0a66ad6b056cd","author":"熟睡的猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7313791127176350754","book_name":"美食：我的小店，名震全球","book_short_name":"远舟楼美食传","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0b8a0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7313791165680222735","read_count":"23698","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1331087"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"647","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,美食,无女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a13784b77a20ed64e9aa04e59f74fe5c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779381820&x-signature=mTRiiAjXBhJcLzlH51DnMR6i9bk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"493009446121502","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"104"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004340961CC820BF36F809B31B"}"
